summary: Iteration 85 testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: CS Kanban 'Migrate Historic Data' button visible, Employee Details Currency selector (AED/INR) working, Sales Dashboard loading with charts. 3CX Call Minutes APIs return empty data arrays as expected (no call logs with duration > 0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/3cx/daily-minutes returns 200 with monthly call data (empty data array expected since call_logs only have duration=0 from click-to-call). 2) GET /api/3cx/yearly-summary returns 200 with yearly call data. 3) POST /api/students/migrate-to-new-student works for super_admin and cs_head roles. 4) POST /api/hr/biocloud/fetch-attendance returns proper error (502) instead of 500 crash when BioCloud server unreachable. 5) GET /api/hr/attendance/template/download?month=2026-03 returns xlsx with daily punch columns (Day 1 In, Day 1 Out, etc.). 6) POST /api/hr/attendance/import endpoint exists and validates file upload. 7) ActivationQuestionnaireModal defaults broker_name to 'MILES CAPITALS'. 8) Employee Details Salary tab has Currency selector (AED/INR) working correctly. 9) CS Kanban page shows 'Migrate Historic Data' button for CS Head/Admin.

3cx_daily_minutes_api.details: GET /api/3cx/daily-minutes returns 200 with month and data fields. Data array empty as expected (no call logs with duration > 0).

3cx_yearly_summary_api.details: GET /api/3cx/yearly-summary returns 200 with year and data fields.

student_migration_api.details: POST /api/students/migrate-to-new-student works for super_admin and cs_head. Returns migrated_count.

biocloud_fetch_attendance.details: POST /api/hr/biocloud/fetch-attendance returns proper error (502) when BioCloud unreachable, not 500 crash.

attendance_template_download.details: GET /api/hr/attendance/template/download?month=2026-03 returns xlsx file with daily punch columns.

attendance_import_endpoint.details: POST /api/hr/attendance/import endpoint exists and validates file upload (returns 422 without file).

employee_currency_selector.details: Employee Details Salary tab shows Currency selector with AED and INR options. Tested updating to INR successfully.

cs_kanban_migrate_button.details: CS Kanban page shows 'Migrate Historic Data' button with data-testid='migrate-students-btn' for super_admin.

sales_dashboard_charts.details: Sales Dashboard loads with 59 chart elements. 3CX Call Minutes section may not be visible if no call data exists.
